title: Equality of nonPositiveIntegers -5 and -3
description:
Query:
SELECT ?X WHERE
{
  BIND ("-5"^^xsd:nonPositiveInteger AS ?X)
  FILTER (?X = "-3"^^xsd:nonPositiveInteger)
}

Result:
-3

Besides the fact that these numbers are not equal there is the number -3 in the result which is not even in variable ?X
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_non_positive_integers (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value INTEGER NOT NULL);
SELECT value FROM test_non_positive_integers WHERE value = -3;
SELECT value FROM test_non_positive_integers WHERE value IS NULL;
SELECT value FROM test_non_positive_integers WHERE value < -4;
